text: Hotel name: Villa Adora Bled. A small luxury boutique hotel on the shore of Lake Bled

Location: Cesta svobode 35, 4260 Bled, Slovenia. Directly on the shores of Lake Bled — one of the few hotels with this prime position. Views of Bled Island, Bled Castle, and Triglav Mountains. 2-minute walk to boat station, 15-minute walk to Bled town center, 30-minute walk to Bled Castle.

Room: Princess Suite. Size: 55 m². Capacity: 2 guests. Price: €250/night. Features: Lake view from tower, Living area, Romantic getaway. Description: Very nicely furnished and tastefully decorated. 55 sq m of extremely pleasant space with living area, bedroom and bathroom. The little tower overlooks beautiful Lake Bled. Perfect for couples to experience a romantic night.

Room: Luxury Suite. Size: N/A m². Capacity: 2 guests. Price: €270/night. Features: Lake view, Elegant decor, Comfortable bedding. Description: Nicely furnished suite with tasteful decor and lake views.

Room: Penthouse Suite. Size: 60 m². Capacity: 2 guests. Price: €300/night. Features: 2 floors, King-sized bed, Breathtaking views. Description: The most unique place in the house, designed with good taste. 60 sq m in 2 floors with cosy atmosphere.

Room: Swan Suite. Size: N/A m². Capacity: 2 guests. Price: €370/night. Features: Lake view, Luxury furnishings, Elegant suite. Description: An elegant suite with stunning lake views and luxury furnishings.

Room: Island Suite. Size: 65 m². Capacity: 4 guests. Price: €380/night. Features: First floor, 2 luxury bedrooms, Big living area, 2 balconies. Description: Stylish luxury suite extending over 65 sq m on the first floor. Stunning view of the lake and Bled Island. Perfect for couples, groups of friends, or families.

Room: Prestige Suite. Size: 72 m². Capacity: 2 guests. Price: €420/night. Features: Ground floor, Living area, Dining area, King bed overlooking lake, Luxury bathroom, Spacious terrace. Description: The absolute harmony of artful decor, elegance and spaciousness. Ground floor with unforgettable lake view through all windows.
Room: Castle Suite. Size: N/A m². Capacity: 2 guests. Features: Stylish luxury suite, Castle views. Description: Stylish luxury suite with castle views.

Policies: Check-in: 14:00 (2:00 PM). Check-out: 11:00 (11:00 AM). Breakfast: €22/person served 8-10 AM. Parking: Free private parking on-site — 8 spots. WiFi: Complimentary high-speed WiFi. Pets: €35 per pet per night. Children: All ages welcome. Smoking: Non-smoking property. Cancellation: Varies by room type. Payment: Visa, MasterCard, Maestro, Cash.

Restaurant: Adora Pop Up Restaurant. Creative, locally inspired Slovenian dishes with French, Italian, and international influences. Hours: Lunch Tue-Sun, Dinner Tue-Sun, Brunch Thu-Sat. Phone: +386 40 558 158. Email: evita.vilebled@gmail.com. Terrace with best sunset views in Bled. Tasting menu ~€65/person, wine pairing ~€35/person.
Bar: Elegant cocktails and aperitivos served daily on the terrace with panoramic lake views. Perfect spot for sunset drinks.
Breakfast: Served daily 8:00-10:00 AM, €22/person. Fresh pastries, bread, local Slovenian products. Vegan, vegetarian, and gluten-free options available on request.

Activities: Row to Bled Island, Swimming in Lake Bled, Paddleboarding, Kayaking, Boat tours, 6 km lakeside walking path, Vintgar Gorge walk, Bled Castle visit, Hiking in Julian Alps, Canyoning in Bohinj Valley, Cycling, Day trips to Lake Bohinj and Ljubljana.

Villa Adora Bled is a heritage-protected villa from 1878, converted into a luxury design hotel right on Lake Bled. 7 unique suites with panoramic lake views. Check-in: 14:00, Check-out: 11:00. Breakfast served 8-10 AM. Free WiFi and parking.

Villa Pomona is a design boutique villa located on the most picturesque street in Bled, 3-minute walk from Lake Bled. Features 3 bedrooms with ensuite bathrooms, swimming pool, sauna, and garden. Contact: info@adorabled.com
